description_long: This house features a rectangular, multi-story structure with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The front is lined with evenly spaced trees and a paved walkway, creating a welcoming streetscape. Large, symmetrical windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the property includes a private outdoor area with a swimming pool and landscaped greenery, separated from the street by the house itself. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with minimal decorative elements for a streamlined appearance. The property is bordered by a low curb and surrounded by manicured trees, enhancing its urban residential appeal.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped front lined with trees. The rear features a private pool and garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the property, the pool area, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the private pool, garden, and the back entrance of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, garden, and the alignment of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a paved walkway, flanked by trees, and a minimalistic door design without porch or columns.
